'''Neuro-Saav Corporation''', known simply as '''NeuroSaav''', was a large corporation that produced a wide variety of products, though was perhaps most famous for its [[Electrobinoculars/Legends|electrobinoculars]] and [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] enhancement technologies.

==Designs==
Neuro-Saav primarily concerned itself with blending neurology and technology in its products, leading to the creation of cyborg/[[Droid/Legends|droid]] interface modules, prosthetic eyes, and artificial organs. Such product lines, however, were not as prominent as the company's more mainstream electronics and communications devices, imaging systems, medical bio-technology, and military encryption systems. Some of the company's designs were so cutting-edge that they were illegal in many [[Star system/Legends|star systems]], increasing their value on the black market. The company also produced a number of components used across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] in anything from ground vehicles to [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] and [[Space station/Legends|space stations]].

==History==
During the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Neuro-Saav entered a partnership with the [[Tagge Company/Legends|Tagge Company]], resulting in the formation of an experimental cybernetics company called [[BioTech Industries/Legends|BioTech Industries]], which produced such devices as the [[Borg Construct Aj^6]]. Its links with TaggeCo also ensured Neuro-Saav remained in good graces with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] throughout the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. This gave the company a degree of freedom it had not enjoyed under the Republic, since Neuro-Saav was relatively free of Imperial policies and regulations. With the fall of the Empire, the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] began monitoring cybernetic experimentation, though Neuro-Saav avoided official investigations.

Neuro-Saav also created a subsidiary company, [[Neuro-Saav Technologies/Legends|Neuro-Saav Technologies]], concerned with the manufacture of weapons sighting accessories.
